original: A compound bow made to the specifications of the leithan scout Tanisaran, who trained you in the ancient tradition of leithan bowhunting. It’s a huge bow, but light as a feather and almost unbelievably easy to draw. Your arrows are tipped with acid bulbs that shatter on impact, splattering the target.
context: <<POS:06096006>> anis’s compound bow",e.tooltip='A compound bow made to the specifications of the leithan sco'
